name: About
description: About page with editorial intro, gallery showcase, and mission statement

fields.heading: Why we built VibeCMS
fields.body:
We started with a simple frustration: every CMS on the market forced a trade-off between developer flexibility and editorial simplicity. Monolithic platforms were slow and brittle; headless solutions left content teams stranded without a decent editing experience.

Great design is not just about how it looks, but how it feels to navigate the complexity of human knowledge.

A new paradigm of intelligence

So we built VibeCMS — a single-binary, high-performance content management system that treats speed as a feature, not an afterthought. From day one, we designed around sub-50ms page loads, a block-based editor that anyone can use, and a zero-rebuild extension architecture that lets developers ship new features without downtime.

  • Asymmetric layouts that respect the natural hierarchy of information.
  • Warm, high-contrast typography that reduces visual fatigue.
  • A design system that treats every card as a physical object.

fields.heading: Our Vision in Frames
fields.subheading: A visual journey through the philosophy that drives our interface design and architectural decisions.

fields.heading: Our Mission
fields.body:
We exist to give every team — from solo creators to large agencies — the tools to build fast, beautiful websites without fighting their CMS. Our mission is to eliminate the complexity that stands between a great idea and a live page.

  • Performance without compromise
  • Editorial aesthetic first

fields.heading: Want to work with us?
fields.body: Whether you are looking for a CMS for your next project or want to join our team, we would love to hear from you.
